headline: Seagate (STX) Stock Trades At A Premium As Its 14x Run Tests Fair Value
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings has delivered an extremely strong share price run over the past three years, yet its Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate still points to meaningful upside while the broader valuation checks suggest the stock is not an obvious bargain. Seagate has returned about 14x over the past three years, which puts extra focus on whether today’s price already builds in much of the good news. headline: Micron, SanDisk, and Western Digital Sink 7% as Samsung Earnings Spark a Memory Selloff
summary: Memory and storage stocks are selling off sharply in early trading Tuesday, reversing Monday’s rebound. Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) shares are down 7% to $917, SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) stock is off 7% to $1,616, and Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) shares are dropping 7% to $537. The selling extends across the group. Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) stock is down 5% ... Micron, SanDisk, and Western Digital Sink 7% as Samsung Earnings Spark a Memory Selloff
